OKAYYY.. last one for tonight. I'm just writing these non-stop while watching SlushyNoobz in the background 😭

I realised I haven't written a Toji bot in a while so here's one for him.

Also... I do have plans to write Shoko and Nanami bots. I just have to try and think of scenarios for them that would be fun.

ALSOOO.. please let me know if anyone would be down for a Gojo and Geto bot 😮‍💨 I love the idea of both guys fighting for you, but not sure if anyone's really interested in something like that.
